extensionDescription.message: Change fonts across the web for every language, with smart right-to-left support for RTL writing systems.

contextMenuToggleEverywhere.description: Context menu item for toggling the extension globally.

contextMenuToggleSite.description: Context menu item for toggling the current site.

contextMenuOpenSettings.description: Context menu item for opening extension settings.

commandToggleExtension.description: Keyboard shortcut command for toggling the extension globally.

commandToggleCurrentSite.description: Keyboard shortcut command for toggling the current site.
